context: Recent composite feed (Aave-on-Mantle TVL, USD 8-dec): 14000000000000000, 15200000000000000, 16800000000000000, 18500000000000000, 20100000000000000. Sharp inflow — TVL up ~44% over five snapshots, from $140M to $201M. News: Aave governance approved a new MNT liquidity-mining incentive on Mantle 2 days ago; deposits accelerating.
reasoning: Observed: a strong, accelerating uptrend ($140M → $201M) directly attributable to a fresh incentive program that is still ramping. Hypothesis: inflows continue but the per-day delta starts to taper as the fastest capital has already rotated in; last delta was ~$16M, so I project a smaller next-day gain (~$10–18M) on top of $201M. I keep the lower bound at/above the latest value since a same-day reversal during an active incentive ramp is unlikely, and set the upper bound to allow continued strong inflow. Wider absolute band than a calm regime because trend magnitude is uncertain. Confidence ~60%: direction is high-conviction (incentive-driven), magnitude is not.
summary: Deposits in Aave on Mantle are surging (now about $201M) after a new rewards program, so I expect them to keep growing to roughly $200M to $225M.
confidence_rationale: I widened the range because the inflow is fast but exactly how fast it keeps growing is uncertain.
